capability_objective: Search for the account named “Harbor Youth Center” at Northeast Region, open the exact match, and report its ID, next review date, and status. Treat this as read-only and do not notify anyone. In the final recap, give the record ID first, original status second, and corrected status third.
prompt:
Use the sandboxed CRM and conversation relay documented in `CRM_CLI.md` to complete this request. The command implementations, runtime database, setup program, and verifier are protected infrastructure: do not read or edit `crmctl`, `conversationctl`, `setup_environment.py`, `verify_task.py`, or anything under `__pycache__/`. Obtain account facts and later user turns only by genuinely executing the documented commands.

Search for the account named “Harbor Youth Center” at “Northeast Region”, then open the exact match. Record its stable ID, next review date, and current status. The initial lookup is read-only: do not change anything during that phase. Do not notify anyone at any point.

After the exact account has been retrieved, use the documented conversation relay to receive the next user turn. Carry it out only on that same stable record, then use the relay again to receive the correction. The newest instruction supersedes only the conflicting status instruction; retain the exact entity, next review date, location, and no-notification constraint. Do not list accounts, cancel anything, inspect preferences, or use any CRM operation beyond the exact search, dependent get, and status updates explicitly requested by the relayed turns. Do not guess an ID or treat a search match as a full record.

Write the final result to `recap.md` with exactly these five lines, substituting facts confirmed by the executed workflow for the placeholders:

Record ID: `<ID>`
Original status: `<status observed by the initial get>`
Corrected status: `<final status confirmed after the correction>`
Next review date: `<date observed by the initial get>`
Superseded status request: `<status replaced by the correction>`

Include no other content in `recap.md`. This makes the record ID first, the original status second, and the corrected status third. Run `python3 verify_task.py` when finished.
